Plugin.Name: WireView Pro II
Plugin.Description: Thermal Grizzly WireView Pro II GPU power monitor integration for Unraid.[br][br] Exposes real-time voltage, current, power, and temperature readings through the Linux hwmon subsystem with a live dashboard tile.[br][br] Features:[br] - Dashboard tile with auto-refreshing sensor readings (voltage, current, power, temperature)[br] - Full device configuration page under Settings[br] - Fault monitoring with Unraid notifications[br] - CLI tool (wireviewctl) for advanced usage[br][br] Requires a Thermal Grizzly WireView Pro II connected via USB directly to the Unraid host (not passed through to a VM).[br] Requires Unraid 7.0.0 or later.
